compiled_state.title: Migrate session-safety-check.sh to shared handler + dual-read (new + legacy log path)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: UPDATE

## What
Migrate plugins/dso/hooks/session-safety-check.sh to use the shared hook-error-handler.sh library and read from both the new canonical log path and the legacy log path.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/session-safety-check.sh |

## Implementation
1. Source hook-error-handler.sh with fail-open guard:
   if [ -f "${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh" ]; then
     source "${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh"
     _dso_register_hook_err_handler "session-safety-check.sh"
   fi
2. Replace inline trap with the shared handler registration above
3. Add dual-read: collect errors from BOTH paths:
   - New path: ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl
   - Legacy path: ~/.claude/hook-error-log.jsonl (keep reading during migration window)
   - Merge/deduplicate entries before counting (use ts+hook as key to avoid double-counting if both paths have same entry)
4. Remove the hardcoded HOOK_ERROR_LOG=$HOME/.claude/hook-error-log.jsonl variable
5. Preserve existing rotation logic (entries older than 7 days)

## Note
Do NOT update tests/hooks/test-session-misc-no-jq.sh — it tests session-misc-functions.sh:hook_session_safety_check which still uses the legacy path. That migration is deferred to S4.

## Depends On
- 4444-6bb6 (T3 — RED test must exist before migration)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — session-safety-check.sh migrated to shared hook-error-handler.sh + dual-read. All 11 tests pass (including test_session_safety_reads_legacy_path GREEN). RED marker removed from .test-index.
comments.author: Test
